new_claims.claim_text: Iran announces imminent retaliatory strikes on major bridges & railways in Saudi Arabia, the UAE, Bahrain & Israel, starting from 23:00 this evening (Tehran time).
new_claims.notes: Claim of imminent retaliatory strikes, highly escalatory. Requires independent verification.

updated_claims.notes: Trump's threat to destroy Iranian civilian infrastructure is circulated by a parody account, contributing to conflicting narratives. This makes the claim contested in public discourse.
